have h := stF.toFun_full (lens.proj outerStmtIn) transcript hStmt
    simp only [Verifier.run, Verifier.liftContext] at h ⊢
    rw [ProbComp.Pr_eq_zero] at h ⊢

    simp only [Set.mem_def, Verifier.run, bind_assoc, pure_bind] at hSupp h
    obtain ⟨⟨innerStmtOut, s'⟩, hInner, hLift⟩ := ProbComp.mem_support_bind.mp hSupp
    simp only [ProbComp.mem_support_pure] at hLift
    have hNotIn : innerStmtOut ∉ innerLangOut := h ⟨innerStmtOut, s'⟩ hInner
    have hLiftEq : outerStmtOut = lens.lift outerStmtIn innerStmtOut := by
      injection hLift
    rw [hLiftEq] at hOut
    exact lensSound.lift_sound outerStmtIn innerStmtOut hNotIn hOut

have h := stF.toFun_full (lens.proj outerStmtIn) transcript hStmt
    simp only [Verifier.run, Verifier.liftContext] at h ⊢
    rw [prob_bind_eq_zero]
    intro ⟨innerStmtOut, s⟩ hmem
    simp only [Set.mem_def, prob_pure_eq_zero, Set.indicator_apply, ite_eq_right_iff, one_ne_zero]
    intro hOuter
    have hInner : innerStmtOut ∈ innerLangOut := lensSound.lift_sound outerStmtIn innerStmtOut hOuter
    have : Pr[fun x => x ∈ innerLangOut | V.run (lens.proj outerStmtIn) transcript] = 0 := h
    rw [prob_eq_zero] at this
    exact absurd (Set.mem_of_mem_image_fst hmem) (this innerStmtOut)

have h := stF.toFun_full (lens.proj outerStmtIn) transcript hStmt
    simp only [Verifier.run, Verifier.liftContext, simulate_bind, simulate_pure] at h ⊢
    rw [Prob.pr_bind_eq_zero]

    rw [Prob.pr_pure_eq_zero]
    intro hOut
    have hInner : Pr[fun x => x.1 ∈ innerLangOut | run_simulate init impl V (lens.proj outerStmtIn) transcript] = 0 := h
    simp only [Prob.pr_eq_zero_iff] at hInner
    have hNotInner : innerStmtOut ∉ innerLangOut := hInner ⟨innerStmtOut, s⟩ hmem
    exact hNotInner (lensSound.lift_sound outerStmtIn innerStmtOut hOut)
